title: Readiness Checkpoint Definitions
description: Defines what to check, how to check it, and what guideline it maps to.

description.description: Detailed explanation of what this checkpoint verifies and why

guideline.description: Name of the source guideline document

guideline_section.description: Specific section reference in the guideline

guideline_version.description: Version of the guideline this checkpoint was derived from

severity.description: red = cannot ship (blocks PR), yellow = fix before launch (warning)

type.description: code = automated scan, external = human attestation, hybrid = both

applicable_tags.description: Service tags this checkpoint applies to. Empty = applies to all.

fix_hint.description: Actionable guidance for resolving a failure

doc_link.description: URL to relevant documentation or guideline section

pattern.description: File glob or regex pattern (for glob, grep, file_exists methods)

target.description: Target file or directory to inspect (for grep, json_path methods)

min_matches.description: Minimum number of matches required to pass

expected_value.description: Expected value at the JSON path (any type)

attestation_key.description: Key in external-evidence.json for external/hybrid checks

confidence.description: Scanner confidence in the result. 'likely' and 'inconclusive' produce warnings instead of hard failures.
